# Resource: proxmox_sdn_fabric_openfabric

OpenFabric Fabric in Proxmox SDN. Fabrics in Proxmox VE SDN provide automated routing between nodes in a cluster.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the SDN fabric.

### Optional

- `csnp_interval` (Number) The csnp_interval property for OpenFabric.
- `hello_interval` (Number) The hello_interval property for OpenFabric.
- `ip6_prefix` (String) IPv6 prefix cidr for the fabric.
- `ip_prefix` (String) IPv4 prefix cidr for the fabric.
